integration_validation_v2.evidence: ComfyBridgeFakeAdapterV1 is a contract-sanctioned deterministic offline INPUT ('without real ComfyUI'); persistence is real: record_comfy_workflow_receipt, record_comfy_output_registration_failure, mark_saveimage_fallback all INSERT into real atelier_comfy_* tables (src/atelier/comfy.rs:2243,2314,2657). Tests assert receipt schema, retryable registration failure, SaveImage fallback + event counts against real PG (tests/atelier_comfy_tests.rs:753-771,928,1200-1322).

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-114 [Pose-ComfyUI-Pipeline] ComfyUI Receipt Fixture Corpus -- Create fixtures for workflow receipt
and SaveImage fallback that prove success/failure paths without real ComfyUI or SQLite.
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for ComfyUI Receipt Fixture Corpus
scope.summary: MT-114 [Pose-ComfyUI-Pipeline] ComfyUI Receipt Fixture Corpus -- Create fixtures for workflow receipt, failed registration, replay, and SaveImage fallback that prove success/failure paths without real ComfyUI or SQLite.
